/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/remote.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmuse_remote.so -o libmuse_remote.so CMakeFiles/remote.dir/moc_pyapi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/remote.dir/pyapi.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules ../widgets/libmuse_widgets.so /usr/lib/libpython3.14.so /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libQt5Xml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19
